# Blossom Bakery

A homemade bakery in Great Baddow, Chelmsford, Essex, run by Helen Victors. Bespoke wedding cakes, celebration cakes, cupcakes, hand-iced biscuits, tray bakes and afternoon teas.

## Location
Great Baddow, Chelmsford, Essex CM2 (United Kingdom). Local CM2 delivery for orders for two people or more. Wedding cake delivery across Essex and surrounding counties.

## Contact
- Email: blossombakedgoods@gmail.com
- Phone: 07939 618787
- Hours: Monday–Friday 9am–5pm, Saturday 9am–2pm, closed Sunday
- Orders: pre-order with at least 48 hours' notice

## What we offer
- Wedding cakes — bespoke, with tasting boxes; recent venues delivered to include Gosfield Hall, Hylands House, Crondon Park, Maidens Barn, Roslin Beach Hotel, Apton Hall, Baddow Park, Channels, Lezz Priory, Braxted Park
- Speciality & celebration cakes — over 30 flavours, sponge or chocolate base, 6-inch and 8-inch sizes; up to 4-tier
- Cupcakes — boxes of 6, 12, 18 or 24, with classic swirl, buttercream rose, iced topper or bouquet styles
- Hand-iced biscuits — personalised, all-butter, vanilla or mild-spiced
- Tray bakes — sponge-based, Millionaire's Shortbread, Brownies, Blondies, Tiffin, Rocky Road, Old-School Sprinkle Cake; 30cm × 18cm trays
- Afternoon teas — Traditional (£22.50/pp), Personalised (£24.50/pp), Savoury (£22.50/pp), Children's (£12.50/child), Vegan (£19.50/pp), Sweet Treat Box (£20/pp), Deluxe Sweet Treat Box (£25/pp), Cake Box for Four (£40), Classic Cornish Cream Tea for Two (£18)
- Children's cakes, ganache drip cakes, numbered birthday cakes, giant personalised cookies

## Dietary
Gluten-free (GF), dairy-free (DF) and vegan (V) versions of most cakes and bakes available. Allergens can be combined (GF + V etc.).

## Founder
Helen Victors started Blossom Bakery in 2018, inspired by a trip to Japan where she fell in love with cherry blossoms. Previously a visual merchandising manager. Bakes from a five-star hygiene-rated kitchen.

## Reviews
60+ five-star reviews from Chelmsford and Essex customers. See https://myblossombakery.co.uk/customer-reviews.html
